1.title: Frustrating Transactions
1.query:
timeseries count = avg(netscaler.service.frustratingttlbtransactions.count),
  by: { dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service }
| fieldsAdd python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service_name = entityName(dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Surge Queue Requests
2.query:
timeseries count = avg(netscaler.service.surgecount.count),
  by: { dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_service }

| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

  by: { dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_vpnvserver }
| fieldsAdd python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_vpnvserver_name = entityName(dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_vpnvserver)
| sort arrayAvg(state) desc
| limit 20
